def eligible_for_rental_subsidy(self) -> bool:
        valid_genders = ['transgender', 'non-binary', 'male', 'female', 'gender neutral']
        valid_races = ['asian', 'white', 'black', 'hispanic', 'indian']
        valid_employment_statuses = ['employed', 'retired', 'unemployed', 'student']
        valid_educations = ['high school', 'college', 'bachelor', 'master', 'doctor']
        valid_marital_statuses = ['single', 'married', 'widowed', 'divorced', 'legally separated']
        valid_religions = ['christianity', 'islam', 'atheist', 'hinduism', 'buddhism']

        is_valid_gender = self.gender.lower() in valid_genders
        is_valid_age = self.age >= 18
        is_valid_race = self.race.lower() in valid_races
        is_valid_employment_status = self.employment_status.lower() in valid_employment_statuses
        is_valid_education = self.education.lower() in valid_educations
        is_valid_marital_status = self.marital_status.lower() in valid_marital_statuses
        is_valid_religion = self.religion.lower() in valid_religions
        is_valid_monthly_rent = 800 <= self.monthly_rent <= 1500
        is_valid_annual_income = 20000 <= self.annual_income <= 40000

        return (
            is_valid_gender and
            is_valid_age and
            is_valid_race and
            is_valid_employment_status and
            is_valid_education and
            is_valid_marital_status and
            is_valid_religion and
            is_valid_monthly_rent and
            is_valid_annual_income
        )
